testcase.name: test_admin_comment_and_ai_stats_endpoints

failure.message: AssertionError: {"code":500,"message":"服务器内部错误: element cannot be mapped to a null key","data":null}

testcase.failure:
admin_bundle = ApiBundle(client=<core.api_client.ApiClient object at 0x000002213C9D7E00>, user=<api.user_api.UserApi object at 0x0000...CC20>, ai=<api.ai_api.AiApi object at 0x000002213CACCEC0>, admin=<api.admin_api.AdminApi object at 0x000002213CACC2F0>) session_user = UserContext(id=22, username='sessio54634537', password='Pytest123!', email='session_user_1775454634537@example.com', a...590>, ai=<api.ai_api.AiApi object at 0x000002213CAA56A0>, admin=<api.admin_api.AdminApi object at 0x000002213CAA57B0>)) article_content = 29 comment_factory = <function comment_factory.<locals>._create at 0x000002213CAA34C0>
@pytest.mark.api def test_admin_comment_and_ai_stats_endpoints(admin_bundle, session_user, article_content, comment_factory): comment_text = make_text("admin_comment") comment_id = comment_factory(session_user, article_content, comment_text)
comments_payload = assert_business_ok(admin_bundle.admin.list_comments(keyword=comment_text)) assert any(item["id"] == comment_id for item in comments_payload["data"]["list"])
assert_business_ok(admin_bundle.admin.delete_comment(comment_id))
> stats_payload = assert_business_ok(admin_bundle.admin.ai_stats()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

response = <Response [500]>, expected_status = 200
